title: DeltaCraft
body:
**NO AI WAS USED IN THE MAKING OF THIS MOD**

DeltaCraft (a combination of **Delta**rune and Mine**craft**) adds content from deltarune to minecraft

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/4I88k5RaMiM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

thanks to Toby for Deltarune

thanks to Rubyks for help promotting the mod

you can use this in modpacks, I encourage it actually

Currently the mod contains
 - 
- Dark fountian creation and removeal
- an empty Dark world
- one wood type
- three weopons: Kris's sword, Susie's axe, and Ralsei's scarf (in all 15 colors)
- nine custom enchantments (three for each weapon type)
- cliffs area above the Purple Feilds biome
- kard kingdom villages

Planned features
 - 
- Darkners
- kard castle
- weapons and armors from Deltarune chapter 1
- custom castle town maker
- cyber fields
- cyber city
- weapons and armors from Deltarune chapter 2
- dark world and darkner incompatability
- darkner statues
- how to stop dark world and darkner incompatability
